requirements_met: Supersession handling (exclude by default, include if requested)
Deterministic ordering for equal relevance scores
Query text treated as text only (no special parsing)
Embed service error handling with credential hygiene
Store unreachable error handling with credential hygiene
validation_results.test_output_summary: 14 passed in 0.10s — all acceptance criteria covered by independent test verification
validation_results.code_quality: All quality gates passed; plan_audit_passed: true; honesty_score: 1.0

criteria_verification.notes: Independent test test_search_returns_only_requested_project_memories_ranked_descending PASSED. Evidence shows store.asearch() with project-scoped namespace ('fleet_memory', project) and descending score sort via _sort_key().

Three independent tests covering 0/1/many cardinalities all PASSED: test_search_with_zero_payload_types_returns_all_types, test_search_with_one_payload_type_returns_only_that_type, test_search_with_many_payload_types_returns_those_types. Evidence shows _matches_payload_types() helper.
Independent test test_search_with_domain_tag_returns_only_tagged_memories PASSED. Evidence shows _matches_domain_tags() helper filtering on domain_tags field.
Independent test test_search_excludes_superseded_records_by_default PASSED. Evidence shows _is_superseded() helper checking superseded_by field, with exclusion when include_superseded=False.
Independent test test_search_includes_superseded_when_requested PASSED. Evidence shows supersession filter bypassed when include_superseded=True, returning both records with superseded_by marking.
Independent test test_search_orders_equal_relevance_deterministically PASSED. Evidence shows _sort_key() returning tuple (negated_score, natural_key) for deterministic tie-breaking.
Independent test test_search_empty_project_returns_empty_result PASSED. Evidence shows empty list returned when store.asearch() returns empty, no exception raised.
Independent test test_search_treats_filter_syntax_in_query_as_text PASSED. Evidence shows query string passed directly to store.asearch() without parsing for special syntax.

Independent test test_search_raises_clear_error_when_embed_service_unavailable PASSED. Evidence shows EmbedServiceError propagation with credentials already stripped by embed.py per FEAT-MEM-01 contract.

Independent test test_search_raises_clear_error_when_store_unreachable PASSED. Evidence shows TimeoutError propagation with credentials already stripped by async_store_context per FEAT-MEM-01 contract.

Independent test test_search_mid_search_supersession_resolves_to_one_state PASSED. Evidence shows deduplication by key using seen_keys set, retaining only first occurrence (highest scored after sort).
Quality gates show plan_audit_passed: true. Player claims ruff check passed with zero errors on src/fleet_memory/retrieval/ and tests/unit/test_search_core.py. No contradicting evidence in bundle.

rationale: All 12 acceptance criteria verified via independent test execution (14 tests passed in 0.10s). Quality gates passed (tests, coverage, arch review, plan audit). Honesty verification: 1.0 (no discrepancies). Wiring probe returned parse_degraded with empty findings (ABSENT evidence, but expected for unit tests with mocked store). Functional correctness demonstrated by comprehensive test coverage spanning all edge cases. Advisory issue (missing Phase 3 specialist) is non-blocking; task-work delegation produced complete, tested implementation.
